'''Bril Parry''' was the chief duty officer assigned to the communications station on board the [[MC80a Star Cruiser]] ''[[Naritus]]''. Together with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], Parry witnessed the destruction of [[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]] during the Starbuster Plot. The ''Naritus'' had been assigned to direct a fleet of shuttles and freighters to evacuate the system, just in case, but until the moment when the Thanta Zilbra star went nova, few had taken the threat seriously. He had won the respect of Captain [[Genkal]] and was expected to replace him eventually as captain of the ''Naritus''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
